---
title: "analysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytransit)
library(tidycensus)

gtfs = read_gtfs(here::here("gotriangle_gtfs.zip"))

acs_vars = load_variables(year = 2024, dataset = "acs5")

census = get_acs(
  geography = "tract",
  variables = c(
    "med_hh_income_past_12" = "B19013_001"
  ),
  year = 2024,
  state = "NC",
  survery = "acs5",
  output = "wide"
)
```
